name: SizeDefinitionMode
summary: Controls the size definition mode of the drawing sheet. Set the mode to SizeDefinitionMode.SpecifiedSize if you want to force the sheet to a certain size.

enum_values.name: AutoSize
enum_values.summary: The smallest possible drawing sheet is automatically calculated.

enum_values.name: SpecifiedSize
enum_values.summary: Fixed values are used to control the sheet size.
